title: androsace carinata subsp. chamaejasme
intro: Androsace carinata subsp. chamaejasme, also known as the Alpine rose or Chamaejasme, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Primulaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the digestive system and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Androsace carinata subsp. chamaejasme include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders.
